root_cause: From approximately 20:18 UTC on 28 May 2017 to 03:00 UTC on 1 June 2017, customers leveraging Mozilla Firefox may have been unable to access Azure services, including Azure Management Portal (https://portal.azure.com), Web Apps, Azure Data Lake Analytics, Azure Data Lake Store, Visual Studio Team Services, Azure Service Fabric, Service Bus, and Storage. As a workaround, Firefox users had to use an alternative browser such as Internet Explorer, Safari, Edge, or Chrome.
